response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 - 夏目玲香
response.overview: My wife, Reika, and I have been married for five years. So I asked her what she wanted to do for our fifth wedding anniversary, and she said she wanted to have nude photos taken. She said that she wanted to let loose once in her life, as her days were rather uneventful. I've heard that there are couples who do that, but I can't imagine exposing myself naked in front of others. After much deliberation, I made the best choice and consulted my boss, Mr. Oshima. That same day, Mr. Oshima showed up at my house, talked my wife and me into it, and even set a date for the nude photoshoot.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Reika Natsume
